title: The effect of H1N1 vaccination on serum miRNA expression in children: A tale of caution for microRNA microarray studies.
ehr_evidence: None. The study used serum samples obtained from children enrolled in an open-label randomised control trial.
summary: The study investigated changes in serum microRNA expression in children 21 days after receiving a pandemic influenza (H1N1) vaccination using microarray profiling and RT-qPCR.
key_findings: 19 microRNAs were differentially expressed after vaccination in the discovery cohort.
miR-142-3p was downregulated in the discovery cohort but not replicated in the validation cohort.
Many microRNAs detected by microarray could not be validated by RT-qPCR.
limitations: Small sample size in validation cohort (n=22)
Microarray findings were not consistently replicated by RT-qPCR
